title: Math Whiz grade manifest
description: Pure-data description of one grade level, stored as grade.json in the grade's content folder. The folder plus this file is what makes a grade exist (see docs/PLUGGABLE_CONTENT_PLAN.md). Validated by scripts/build-content-registry.js.

id.description: Lowercase folder id (e.g. g4). Must equal the grade's folder name.

key.description: Storage key used in profiles.selectedGrade, classes.gradeLevel and question-bank docs. IMMUTABLE once published.

shortLabel.description: Short label used inline in copy, e.g. "4th".

ordinal.description: Numeric grade level. Drives sort order and grade normalization (matching the digit in values like "Grade 4").

default.description: Grade new students start in. Exactly one enabled grade must set this to true.

enabled.description: false = grade is fully wired but invisible to users (safe staging for a new grade).

standards.description: Grade-level Common Core standards by strand (informational).

storyRequirements.description: Bullet lines for the Requirements block of the story-problem prompt (gemini-proxy). Topic guidance comes from each topic manifest's ai.guidelines.
